Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Rules I can infer: 1. Temporal Clustering: Events occurring in a contiguous sequence without significant time gaps (comparing timestamps) 2. Resource Coherence: Events performed by the same resource or resource type (e.g., Operator A handling material, Operator B welding) 3. Functional Phase: Events serving the same purpose (preparation, transformation, verification, finishing) 4. Physical Transformation: Events that transform the same aspect of the workpiece (shape, surface, temperature) 5. Input-Output Dependency: Events where one event prepares for the next (e.g., picking up tool before welding, preheating before welding)
